Issue when exposing Succesfactor API through CAPM

and I had followed all the code and Destination as per the Tutorial.

Have imported the edmx 

package.json

lib/handler.js : 

Service.cds 

Getting the error when try to hit the GET on 

@ale_biagi Help us to understand if we are missing something  we are just Reading the Data and not doing any Create or Update.We are not able to Read the SF API from CAP as mentioned in tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-extend-sfsf-cap.html

and Community blog 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/extend-sap-successfactors-on-sap-btp-with-cap-add-business-logic/ba-p/13526502

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi Mr David,

I am Tuan Anh from VietNam.

I am working as a PP consultant at a SAP partner. I graduated from university two years ago from an economics school, which was not related to information technology. However, I was fortunate to have been exposed to SAP while I was still a student, and decided to pursue this career right after graduation.

I have wanted to obtain an SAP certification for a long time, but the cost barrier is significant for a recent graduate like me in Vietnam. Therefore, This will be a great opportunity to obtain an SAP certification while also upgrading my skills.

Please consider my application for certification. Thank you!

Thanks&Best Regard

Nguyen Tuan Anh

entry.title: Run report showing machine time for a mass list of PN#'s?
entry.content:
We have a large number of sku's that go through assembly there is a large variety in what might run one week vs the next. 

 

I can run COOIS to get the list of sku's but cannot figure out how to get the associated machine time? We do have machine time setup in the routings but currently I have to search each sku's routing one at a time. 

I've also tried CA51 but that gives to much information in a format that isn't friendly to work with in excel. 

Any expert advise out there?

entry.title: Re: Can someone explain what the difference is between ap...
entry.content:
Hi,

FI-CAC in S/4HANA on-premise and cloud, private edition offers comparable functional scope like FI-CAX. Main differences between FI-CAC and FI-CAX are:

 - FI-CAC provides best practices content via several scope items (for USA and Germany).

- FI-CAC offers additional modern APIs. These APIs are also provided for the public cloud solution S/4HANA cloud for contract accounting and invoicing.

- FI-CAC has no functionality for balance interest calculation, only document based interest calculation is available (in particular, I have never seen a project in which interest is calculated by the amount. Always by document, so I don't see any difference).

- FI-CAC has no functionality to post requests (transactions FKKORD*).

You can check these details in note 3280146.
Best Regards

#BRIM #FI-CA

entry.title: GroupBy not working
entry.content:
How can i add a option to group by in my list report?

I need this option:

 

 

 

 

 

I tried with annotation below, but didn't work:

@ui.presentationVariant: [{

sortOrder: [

{ by: 'belnr' }],

groupBy: [ 'belnr' ],

visualizations: [{ element: 'belnr', type: #AS_LINEITEM }],

requestAtLeast: [ 'belnr' ]

}]

 I tried to use UI.selectionPresentationVariant, but nothing.

I changed the table type in manifest.json to AnalyticalTable, GridTable... nothing.

I tried in V2 and V4.... nothing.

 

Please help me to achieve this!

entry.title: Re: Returns Warehouse can be used for invoices
entry.content: Hi, thanks for your help.

entry.title: Query to create draft for a child entity in composition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using CAP(Node.js) odata V4 & listReport page template with fiori elements. I have two entities Lets say parent & child, they have a composition relation between them. The child entity table is displayed on the object page and there i have added a custom action button which opens a valuehelp dialog and there user can add multiple entries from the value valuehelp. The reason custom button was added was that it enables the user to add multiple entries in one go and he doesnt have to create it one by one using the create button. When you try to create an entry in child table using create button the call that is sent is this : 

NEW Parent(ID=123,IsActiveEntity=false)/child
i want to replicate this call. I tried using the following but it didnt work :
await this.send({
            query: INSERT.into(`Parent(ID=${req.params[0].ID},IsActiveEntity=false)/child`).entries(data),
            event: "NEW ",
        });
Any ideas how to solve this ?

entry.title: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sheets?
entry.content: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sheets?

entry.title: Re: Change-state in goal plan template and how to use this in the performance form at route map leve
entry.content: Hi there. I just went through this for our Development Plan. We noticed that last year only Performance Goals had a goal plan state defined in the xml and wanted the same for our Development Goals. If you don't already have the Goals xml updated with the goal plan state info, unfortunately you'll need to work with a partner on that. You'll want to take all of the permissions already set in the xml and apply those to a Goal Planning state. Then you'll need to define all of the permissions for a Goal Locked state where you mostly would leave as read only for the roles that had more access in the Goal Planning state. SAP won't make that many changes in xml. Once your Goal Plan states are setup, it's pretty simple. In Manage Templates, go to a section that includes one of your Goal Plans and click on Show advanced options. You'll now have a link for Configurations defined for Goal Plan State where you can select the Route Map steps and define which state the form should be in during each one.

entry.title: More questions about downloading the CR Runtime 64bit for 13.0.2
entry.content: I am trying to get an old WebForms app working which was written years ago by people who are no longer here. From what I've been able to determine it uses Crystal Reports for Visual Studio 13.0.2. I found a post from last year, titled Where to download CRRuntime_64bit_13_0_20.msi, which brings up this topic, but I've got some additional questions. I've gone to this page to download the MSI, however it doesn't have version 13.0.2, so I downloaded version 13.0.6 for Visual Studio. (I'm doing development using Visual Studio 2019 Enterprise Edition.) I'm concerned, will this work for me? Or will I have to install version 13.0.6 onto the web server?

entry.title: An error occurred during processing the process step "IC Purchase Order"
entry.content:
Hello - Anyone has idea on this error " An error occurred during processing the process step "IC Purchase Order"

We are implementing Advanced Intercompany Sales Process but facing an issue with process step. created sales order successfully but no subsequent steps generated automatically, as per advanced intercompany configuration guide all master data & configuration is in place.

Regards,

Ashutosh

entry.title: Re: UI Annotation for masking field value
entry.content:
The way you can identify this is by checking your $metadata 

As given below 

 

<Property Name="Password" />
  <Annotations Target="Password" xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm">
    <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1.Masked" />
  </Annotations>

 

Determines that a control must not display the actual value in a field with sensitive data, but replace it with a placeholder, for example, *. Use this annotation for sensitive data.

And it's available since: 1.28.1 make sure your UI5 version is higher than this.

class sap.ui.comp.smartfield.SmartField

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC - One central check system for multiple systems on various releases
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

I understand that the best solution for evaluating and migrating ABAP codes in a conversion from ECC to S/4HANA is Remote Code Analysis in ATC.

In this context, regarding using Remote Code Analysis in ATC for the conversion to S/4HANA, I have a question.

What are the SAP hardware and software prerequisites for installing and configuring the ATC Central Check System? I heard that the ATC Central Check System must be configured in an environment similar to the target SAP S/4HANA (latest release) so that it can be compared with the data dictionary, etc., is that true or is there another way/procedure? What is the best way, in terms of agility and cost-benefit, to have the ATC Central Check System?

Thank you.

FAFR

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Sao Paulo Group - Bem vindos ao Grupo de Sao Paulo
entry.content:
Olá pra todos!

Jorge, como vai? Espero que bem.

Responderei tua pergunta, mas com outra pergunta. 
Vamos lá! 😄

Você chegou a fazer uma busca por algum dos centros  autorizado da SAP na parte de treinamentos? Perguntando, pois aqui em S. Paulo, certamente há algumas opções de eventos como treinamentos direcionados, palestras, cursos menores e, claro, as academias voltadas para vários módulos (principalmente aos que você comentou), e também para novas tecnologia da SAP.

De imediato que me recordo voltado para academia seriam a Ka Solution e GPLux.

Outra opção bacana e que seria ótima alternativa de estudo. Mas, não na mesma objetividade da academia. OK? Seriam as SAP University Alliances. Sobre elas, posso te dizer que atualmente, é possível realizar treinamentos dela no formato on-line. Eu fiz e super indico. Achei bem bacana esta modalidade e formato do curso.

Qualquer dúvida, sigo à disposição e espero ter ajudado você e aos demais colegas da área.

Abs!
Mauricio Santana

entry.title: Re: Eclipse, Field for creation user is missing in source...
entry.content: I am running into the same error even after following the above instruction and activating after making the change before trying again.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi @Amit56 ,

Try executing npm view @Spartacus/schematics in your console. What is the latest version you are shown? If it's 4.3.8, then you're talking to the wrong server, and you need to take a look at the .npmrc file in the current directory. That's where the npm command (also the ng command) looks to know what repository to query. You need to query the SAP Repository-Based Shipment Channel (RBSC), not the public open source repository. That file also needs to contain valid NPM Base64 Credentials (which you generated as part of these instructions). Check that your user has a license for Spartacus. If you don't, then that's the root of your problem.

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Personnel number CDS view
entry.content:
Hi !

You probably need to be looking at the work force agreement views

For example I_PersonWorkAgrmtToExternalID has the personnel id - but it doesn't necessary map to BP Id

In the view browser, if you search the advanced search settings for Column Name with "Personnel Number" you get ~400 views - might want to simplify to "Personnel". 

BUT a lot of those are not released. 

You can look into a custom cds view with the following data sources

 

 

You might be hitting up against some GDPR restrictions as well

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: How to automate EWM related steps for Deliveries?
entry.content:
Business is requesting if there is a way to automate Delivery process to simplify the Receiving and Goods issuing for WM managed locations.

They want WM locations to have simple steps like the IM location but we cannot eliminate the extra WM-related steps so we are hoping we can automate some of them. Is this possible for S4 PERSON_NAME Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to automate EWM related steps for Deliveries?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Please check some APPs available that you could use to automatize some important steps related to the Receiving and Good issue for WM-managed locations:

‘Manage Outbound Delivery Orders ’ App: This app allows you to manage outbound deliveries. You can select all items and click ‘Create WTs’ to automatically create warehouse tasks for items that have available stock. This can help to avoid partial picking of the delivery. If you want the system to only create the warehouse tasks if all the delivery items have sufficient stock to be picked, you can enable the flag ‘Completely Pick Warehouse Request’ in SSCUI ‘Change Warehouse Process Type Settings’ (SSCUI 103863).

‘Post Goods Issue – Unplanned’ App: This app supports unplanned goods issues without outbound delivery orders. You can post goods issues for partial quantity or entire quantity. This app also allows you to assign the goods issue to an accounting element like a cost center, internal order, or project.

‘Process Warehouse Tasks’ App: This app allows you to confirm warehouse tasks, which include tasks for picking.

'Schedule Warehouse Task Creation - Picking' APP: With this app, you can create pick warehouse tasks automatically in the background in defined time intervals. By doing this, you can avoid creating tasks manually.

Pack Handling Units – Advanced’ App: This app allows you to automatically pack products into handling units based on predefined packing instructions. This can significantly speed up the packing process and ensure consistency in how products are packed.

Please check some SAP Documentation for further information:

Manage Outbound Delivery Orders

Post Goods Issue - Unplanned

Process Warehouse Tasks

Process Warehouse Tasks - Picking

Process Warehouse Tasks - Putaway

Process Warehouse Tasks - Internal Movements

Feature Comparison for Confirming Warehouse Tasks

Exceptions

Automatic picking in Outbound delivery SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

Automatic Packing for Outbound Deliveries

 

In case this didn't help with your concern that is related to this post, we kindly ask you to follow up on this topic. 

Thank you and best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: double consumption
entry.content: hello thank you for responding The issue of double consumption with the handheld scanner occurs during the confirmation of item consumption in the picking process. When the operator confirms the consumption, the system sometimes records this action twice, leading to double consumption for a single item

entry.title: Crystal Report textfile ODBC
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using Crystal Report 2020 to produce a report that will list the report definition of a set of several Crystal Reports. In order to read each report definition (which are txt files), I am using the Driver:  "CR textfile ODBC driver 7.1.6." in which I set the default table type = Stream. And to test the concept,  I am starting by reading only one text file/report definition. 

As we know,  a Crystal Report definition always starts with the following phrase "Crystal Report Professional v14.0 (32-bit) - Report Definition.".  

The problem I have is that each record wraps after 65 characters (which happens to be the length of the first phrase present in the Report Definition).  I have read that when Crystal Report reads a text file,  it is establishing the length of each column by reading the first few records. This lead me to think that the wrapping is base on the number of characters of the 1 row present in my text file ("Crystal Report Professional v14.0 (32-bit) - Report Definition.").  

To verify my hypothesis,  I replaced the 1st record of one of my text file from "Crystal Report Professional v14.0 (32-bit) - Report Definition." to a 250 characters string.  It turned out my hypothesis was correct,  the records were no longer wrapped. 

Does somebody have ever experienced something like that or have a work-around to suggest?

Thanls 🙂

entry.title: Re: Add MicroProcessFlowItem to MicroProcessFlow inside t...
entry.content: I really preciatte your time for answer me :), thank you it really helps me

entry.title: Hello
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

I am Aaloka, founder and CEO of Maya Data Privacy, an SAP® PartnerEdge® – Build Partner

We work on making Enterprise Data Usable in compliance with regulations like GDPR, DORA, NIS2, AI Act in Europe and CCPA, PIPEDA, DPDPA, PDPL, DIFC and several others across the globe. 

We aim to help customers in RISE transition smoothly from their legacy environments to S/4HANA environments, with ease of test system creation using Privacy Enhancing Technology for creating production copies. We do solve many other data usage issues for client for using data.  

About myself, I am a big SAP fan and SAP admirer working on several clients digital transformation projects during my previous roles at SAP. Would love to connect to more and more people in the community and help solve business challenges using SAP technology.

Best regards,

Aaloka

entry.title: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hello Dears, 
My client has a Pain point that when products are produced, representative comes first has edge to load quantity he wants with no considerations for another Reps . He needs to constrains this by SAP System but not by quantity he need it by percentage. He does not want product allocations as follows if for example he produces 1000 pcs daily 
Dist.Channel 1 : 500 PCS
Dist.Channel 2 : 300 PCS 
Dist.channel 3 : 200 PCS 

Production is not a fixed quantity daily , so he needs it to be for example: 
Dist.channel 1 : 50 % 
Dist.channel 2 : 30 % 
Dist.channel 3 : 20 % 

so does anything in SAP Standards fit this requirement ?

@

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano Hello David

I’m Abdallah ,and I’m thrilled to join the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work with Edraky, where we specialize in delivering SAP training and implementation services to businesses throughout Africa and the Middle East. Our mission is to assist companies in effectively adopting and leveraging SAP solutions. Having joined the Beginner Corner, I’m excited to engage with the community, learn from seasoned SAP professionals, and contribute as I start my journey in the SAP world. Feel free to send me a private message now that I'm part of the group. I’m looking forward to getting started

entry.title: We did it... SAP confirmed it is NIST CSF Tier 3
entry.content:
By Vanessa Barber and Hedayatollah Hosseini from SAP SE and Dr. Peter Westphal from EY

At SAP, cybersecurity is paramount. We know that our customers trust us to provide solutions that help them keep business-critical data and systems safe. That’s why we’ve implemented the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) Cybersecurity Framework (CSF v1.1), achieving Tier 3 alignment.

“Addressing cybersecurity risks isn't just about having strong defenses, it's about building trust with our customers and partners. By achieving Tier 3 with the NIST CSF implementation, we are not only demonstrating that SAP strategically manages its cybersecurity risk, but that we also prioritize our improvements and make informed investment decisions to address these cybersecurity risks head-on.”

Sebastian Lange, Chief Security Officer, SAP SE.

 

What is the NIST CSF

The NIST CSF is a set of guidelines designed to help manage and mitigate cybersecurity risks. It provides a structured approach to the assessment of and commitment to continuously improving an organization’s ability to identify, detect, protect, and respond to and recover from cyberattacks.

 

How we achieved Tier 3 Status

The journey began in 2021 when, at the direction of SAP’s Chief Security Officer, SAP engaged a third-party audit company to conduct a comprehensive NIST cybersecurity assessment to determine the status of its security posture aligned with the NIST CSF. We convened the top security experts to lead the charge and began our journey to fully implement the NIST CSF. Following this launch, SAP initiated activation workshops moderated by security experts to develop a common blueprint for SAP’s cybersecurity organization. This blueprint led to the identification of gaps and priorities, which were discussed and aligned with the Lines of Businesses through a series of calibration workshops, culminating in the successful closure of all identified gaps by the end of 2023, two months ahead of schedule.

“Our achievement of Tier 3 in the NIST CSF implementation signifies not only our commitment to robust cybersecurity and strategic management of cybersecurity risks, but also our dedication to transparency and trust with our customers and partners.”

Marielle Ehrmann, Chief Security Compliance & Risk Officer, SAP SE.

 

How we performed the NIST CSF self-assessment

As the NIST CSF focuses on self-assessment and does not involve a third-party audit, certification, or scoring, SAP jointly developed with EY its very own self-assessment methodology - aligned with the principles of an organization managing its own risk. This methodology was reviewed and validated by a global independent audit firm, and the results of the self-assessment were further reviewed and validated by a second, global independent auditor.

 

What’s in it for SAP and our customers

Achieving NIST CSF Tier 3 not only fosters trust in SAP's products and services but also demonstrates our commitment to keeping customers safe and processes and data protected. Furthermore, SAP's achievement shows proactive management of cyber risks while also assisting customers in enhancing their own cybersecurity measures. To support customers in this endeavor, SAP plans to share insights gained from its implementation and release the jointly developed assessment framework with EY for use by other organizations.

 

What’s next?

Looking forward, SAP aims to incorporate changes from the recently released NIST CSF v2.0 into its framework and become a more adaptive cybersecurity organization capable of addressing the challenges posed by AI and new, emerging technologies and responding effectively to a continuously increasing threat landscape.

 

Learn more

To find out more about our NIST CSF implementation and self-assessment methodology, check our recently published brochure “How SAP is safeguarding its customers: Implementing the NIST Cybersecurity Framework achieving Tier 3 alignment

entry.title: Identity Federation in IAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have configured Azure and IAS as a proxy. Users and groups from Azure are provisioned to IAS and granted access in BTP. However, there appears to be an issue with the identity federation.

Settings in IAS:

  • Allow Identity Authentication users only = OFF
  • Identity Federation: Use Identity Authentication user store = ON
  • Default Name ID Format =  unspecified
  • Subject Name Identifier = ${corporateIdP.userPrincipalName}
  • Attributes:
    • Corporate Identity Provider = ${corporateIdP.Groups}
    • Corporate Identity Provider = ${mail}
    • Corporate Identity Provider = ${login_name}
    •  

When a user exists in Azure but is not present in IAS, they cannot log in to the SAP Cloud App.

The following error message appears:

Error: Due to a misconfiguration, the Identity Provider cannot process the response. Please contact your system administrator. Troubleshooting: You can provide your administrator with the following correlation ID:

What do you think might be causing this issue ?

Thank you for your help.

Best regards

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Access a property in message mapping from a content modifier
entry.content:
I have this groovy script 

import com.sap.it.api.mapping.*;
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
/
def String getProperty (String Almacen_Codigo, MappingContext context) {
String value1 = context.getProperty(Almacen_Codigo);
return value1;
}

This script "getProperty" was created   to access the property "Almacen_Codigo"  of type xpath declared in a previous content modifier , but is not reading the property for some reason, the STGE_LOC xpath refers to a value 

please do someone know?

entry.title: Capturing Survey Response in C4C
entry.content:

We need to capture survey responses in C4C that will be sent from a third-party system. I’ve reviewed the OData documentation, which states that we can’t create survey responses via the API. Is there an alternative approach we can consider to achieve this?

I do have 2 questions:

  2. Is there a similar plugin solution for ABAP on SAP BTP?

entry.title: How to setup low value assets
entry.content:
I'm looking for a document on how to setup a Low Value Asset  for S/4 HANA Public Cloud.
I have tested the process using our TDD tenant but I would like to cross-refer to an official SAP document for setup and process flow to make sure that I don't miss anything.

I tried looking for LVA scenarios in Signavio (J62) but can't find it. This is for US Localizaiton.
Thank You.

entry.title: Re: Query to create draft for a child entity in composition
entry.content:
Checkout the code for fillEntities handler

https://github.com/MertSAP/AppTemplater/blob/main/srv/apptemplater-service.js
 
Here is a snippet you should be able to adapt:
 

 

 await this.create(ServiceAuth.drafts).entries({
            to_ServiceRole_RoleUUID: RoleUUID,
            AuthType_AuthorisationType: req.data.AuthorisationType,
            DraftAdministrativeData_DraftUUID: entity.DraftAdministrativeData_DraftUUID,
            AuthEntity_EntityUUID: entity.EntityUUID
          })

entry.title: CCO HTML plugin example dosen't work
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I am trying to generate a new modal with the example CustomHTML. However, when I trigger my event, the screen shows the modal, but the HTML content disappears.

 

 

What do I need to do?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SQLITE_CONSTRAINT: UNIQUE constraint failed error during CAP Tutorial Execution
entry.content: Are you able to please provide screenshots of your schema?

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Real-World S/4HANA Invoice Approval Process with SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Thank you so much! Amazing Presentation!

entry.title: Re: Connecting external Output Management System to SAP Print Queue in SAP Cloud Solutions
entry.content:
Nice blog @martin_vierling.

We are in the process of implementing this on S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service, integration suite and CPM, but we are having an issue with the SAP_COM_0647 (Push integration) which seems to only trigger or send a notification to call a BTP integration suite endpoint when you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app and not when there is a new queue item added. 

Your assistance is greatly appreciated.

Regards

JP

entry.title: Re: Issue with : Perform Maintenance Jobs without assignm...
entry.content: Thanks Tim for your response, In summary Job(s) / operation(s) has to be assigned to individual, without assignment it is not possible to confirm the Job, I also understand other scenario where technician can confirm the Job without assigning to himself for Job which is already assigned to supervisor. Thanks.

entry.title: To disable add/delete checkbox under settings of Mytime sheet app in sap Fiori
entry.content:
Hi SAP FIORI MASTERS.

We have situation where user having the chances of adding multiple lines  time on the same day when entering the time sheet in SAP FIORI  MytimeSheet app.  Hence request you to throw some light to disable add/delete checkbox under settings of Mytime sheet app in sap Fiori.

 

Thanks in advance

Hari Yoga

entry.title: Re: Error While Executing "Capacity scheduling table" App.
entry.content: Remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement.

entry.title: Re: Error While Executing "Capacity scheduling table" App.
entry.content: Add tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing.

entry.title: Re: Password reset emails - external candidates
entry.content:
Hi,

Emails will not be delivered because Google does not accept emails from dummy domains. Check if the single sender is enabled and an email with a valid domain is maintained.

entry.title: Re: Installing SAP R/3 2.1D
entry.content:
Thank you for a walk down memory lane!! I started supporting Australia's first live R/3 site R2.1E straight out of high school, aged 17. 

I'd forgotten all about the default password! Needed more access? Just delete all the users and SAP* password magically reset to the default. Simpler times 🙂

Shout out to Anthony Pickering for teaching me the many ways to hack the early SAP systems!!

entry.title: Re: Access a property in message mapping from a content modifier
entry.content: Can you share a sample payload?

entry.title: print push integration (SAP_COM_0467)
entry.content:
Hi 

We are in the process of implementing external printing or OMS on S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service, integration suite and CPM, but we are having an issue with the SAP_COM_0647 (Push integration) which seems to only trigger or send a notification to call a BTP integration suite endpoint when you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app and not when there is a new queue item added. 

Regards

JP

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Newtown Square (Thu, Sept 26)
entry.content:
Dear NSQ community,

Join us for an SAP Community Meetup on Thursday night. This event is informal, anyone is welcome, and all topics are open to discussion. 

🗓Date: September 26, 2024
🕔Time: 6 PM
📍Location: UNO Pizzeria & Grill, West Chester Pike, Newtown Square

Don't miss out on the chance to hang out, eat some pizza and have a good time. Please RSVP to let us know whether you are coming. We are looking forward to seeing you on Thursday.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: I already posted the screnshot on a new answer

entry.title: Re: Installing SAP R/3 2.1D
entry.content:
Hi there,

This blog post is really cool, very interesting to see how the system evolved over time (and in some places it might still look very similar). The oldest one I had logged into was 3.0F (it was still live in 2010 at a customer).

 

🙂

 

Regards.

ZFiori.

entry.title: how do I change the end date of the sale price in bulk
entry.content:
Hello teachers,

We usually use "manage prices", "set material prices" and "data migration" to maintain prices. To avoid the price cannot be updated in time, we maintain most of the prices as permanent use, such as "valid until" as "9999-12-31", daily price adjustment can be imported in bulk, such as: The original price execution date is "2024-09-01" to "9999-12-31". If the price is changed on September 25, the imported price is "2024-09-25" to "9999-12-31". The system automatically switches the price to two price records "2024-09-01" to "2024-09-24" and "2024-09-25" to "9999-12-31", and the records of our price maintenance are also stored in the system. However, there is a difficulty, if our products are removed from the market, the end date of the price of the batch cannot be modified, for example: The price is "2024-09-01" to "9999-12-31". We hope to change the price to "2024-09-01" to "2024-09-25" by batch processing. At present, the price information can only be modified one by one and cannot be processed in large quantities. We have tens of thousands of prices that need to modify the end date. Is there any way to modify the end date in batches?

entry.title: "Go Live" Button to be clicked
entry.content:
Hi, we are planning to click the "Go Live" button within CCV2 portal for our P3 production environment as part of our next production release. Can you please advise if there are any other considerations needed before we perform this action? 


Thanks


PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: "Go Live" Button to be clicked
entry.content:
about go live Prerequisites please refer to the link as below

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/0fa6bcf4736c46f78c248512391eb467/9b68681d731249c1be40652cd0702513.html?locale=en-US#prerequisites

entry.title: Re: Production Order Settlement Error
entry.content: You need to first ensure you have a full settlement rule instead of periodic settlement, and then in put settlement peirod as 7, posting peirod as 8

entry.title: Saving Files in S/4HANA Cloud Public using ABAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm working on a migration project to S/4HANA Cloud Public that requires me to save files using ABAP. I'm refactoring code that utilizes function modules (like SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT_API1) and classes (like cl_binary_relation), but I understand these are not available in the ABAP Cloud environment.

Could anyone provide guidance on how to achieve file-saving functionality in S/4HANA Cloud Public?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap c...
entry.content:
Hello Nidhi, 

As Ryan mentioned, the provided sample XML payload is invalid. If the source XML contains unescaped special characters like '@', '<', or '>', XSLT processing will fail. A Groovy script is a better option for handling invalid XML and generating valid output. The script is more robust than XSLT as it can handle XML validity issues. However, it assumes a specific structure, so you may need to modify it based on changes in your payload. Use the script below as a reference starting point to build/ customise as per your requirement.

Groovy Script - 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.*

// Function to process the incoming message
def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body of the message as a String
    def body = message.getBody(String)
    def result

    try {
        // Parse the XML body using XmlParser
        def xmlParser = new XmlParser(false, false)
        def rootNode = xmlParser.parseText(body)

        // Prepare to build the new XML output
        def writer = new StringWriter()
        def xmlBuilder = new MarkupBuilder(writer)

        // Create the Root element
        xmlBuilder.Root {
            // Traverse all nodes in the XML
            rootNode.depthFirst().each { node ->
                // Check for the Root1 element
                if (node.name() == 'Root1') {
                    Root1 {
                        // Process each child node of Root1
                        node.children().each { childNode ->
                            // If the child is AssignedTo, extract the email
                            if (childNode.name() == 'AssignedTo') {
                                def emailMatch = (childNode.text() =~ /([^<\s]+@[^>]+)/)
                                if (emailMatch) {
                                    // Add only the email to the output
                                    AssignedTo(emailMatch[0][0])
                                }
                            } else if (childNode.name() == 'AdditionalComments') {
                                // Extract comments from the div tag
                                AdditionalComments(childNode.div.text())
                            } else {
                                // Add other child nodes as they are
                                "${childNode.name()}"(childNode.text())
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // Convert the writer output to string
        result = writer.toString()
    } catch (Exception e) {
        // If parsing fails, handle it with a more lenient approach
        def lines = body.readLines()
        // Initialize the output with the XML declaration and Root tag
        def output = new StringBuilder("<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n<Root>\n")

        boolean inRoot1 = false
        // Process each line of the original XML
        lines.each { line ->
            // Skip XML declaration and Root tags
            if (line.contains('<?xml') || line.contains('<Root>') || line.contains('</Root>')) {
                return
            }
            // Detect the start of Root1 and set the flag
            if (line.contains('<Root1>')) {
                inRoot1 = true
                output << "  <Root1>\n"
                return
            }
            // Detect the end of Root1 and reset the flag
            if (line.contains('</Root1>')) {
                inRoot1 = false
                output << "  </Root1>\n"
                return
            }
            // If we are inside Root1, process its children
            if (inRoot1) {
                if (line.contains('<AssignedTo>')) {
                    // Extract email from AssignedTo using regex
                    def emailMatch = (line =~ /([^<\s]+@[^>]+)/)
                    if (emailMatch) {
                        output << "    <AssignedTo>${emailMatch[0][0]}</AssignedTo>\n"
                    }
                } else if (line.contains('<AdditionalComments>')) {
                    // Extract comments from the div tag
                    def comment = line.findAll(/<div>(.*?)<\/div>/)
                    if (comment) {
                        output << "    <AdditionalComments>${comment[0][1]}</AdditionalComments>\n"
                    }
                } else if (line.trim().startsWith('<') && line.trim().endsWith('>')) {
                    // Add other tags as they are
                    output << "    ${line.trim()}\n"
                }
            }
        }

        // Close the Root tag
        output << '</Root>'
        result = output.toString()
    }

    // Set the transformed XML as the body of the message
    message.setBody(result)
    return message
}


Source Invalid XML - 

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
<Root>
<Root1>
<ADONumber>12345</ADONumber>
<State></State>
<AssignedTo>SRIVASTAVA Nidhi (External) <nidhi.srivastava.ext@XXXXX.eu> </AssignedTo>
<Priority></Priority>
<AdditionalComments>
<div>Comment 5</div>
</AdditionalComments>
</Root1>
</Root>

Output Valid XML - 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Root>
<Root1>
<ADONumber>12345</ADONumber>
<State></State>
<AssignedTo>nidhi.srivastava.ext@XXXXX.eu</AssignedTo>
<Priority></Priority>
<AdditionalComments>d</AdditionalComments>
</Root1>
</Root>

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: I don't see any screenshot like that.

entry.title: Unlock the Power of SAP Signavio Process Intelligence to Elevate Your UiPath Automations
entry.content:
Turn process mining findings in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence into automation improvements for non-SAP scenarios with UiPath.

Are you interested in having a seamless handover from insights to action for your non-SAP processes? Then this blog is for you! 

In this post, we will dive deeper into integrating SAP Signavio Process Intelligence with a non-SAP system that supports webhooks, via the “Integrate Using Webhooks” Action task.  

Now, let’s walk through the steps of integrating SAP Signavio Process Intelligence with UiPath, through UiPath’s Integration Service HTTP Webhook Connector. 

First, we need to create a connection. A connection is the identifier for the external URL that will be generated. If you want others to build workflows, consider creating the connection in a shared folder. 

  1. Find the HTTP Webhook connector in the Integration Service catalog.
  2. Select Connect to HTTP Webhook.
  3. In the connection screen, you must provide a name for the application you’re connecting to, for example, “signavio”.
  4. In UiPath Studio, start your workflow with the HTTP Webhook: Webhook Event Happened event.
  5. Start New Project.
  6. Add “HTTP Webhook: Webhook Event Happened” event in Main Sequence:
  7. Once you select the connection “signavio” you created earlier from the drop down menu, the activity will present you with a URL. This URL is accessible from outside UiPath and does not change during the lifespan of the connection. It will be needed to set up the Integrate Using Webhooks Action task in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.
  8. Using the activity, define filters on the body or headers for the incoming events. If no filtering is provided within the activity, your robot will be triggered for every incoming event.
  9. Add an “Assign/Set Variable Value” activity: 
  10. Assign parsed JSON to a variable (named “result” in demo): 
  11. Add “Write Storage Text” activity: 
  12. Designate absolute Path to destination file, Storage Bucket Name, and data to be sent, result.ToString (variable assigned earlier, ‘.ToString’ converts to string and displays as such):
  13. Save workflow.
  14. Publish workflow:
    1. Publishing an automation project means archiving the project folder so that it can be sent to Robots and then executed.
    2. When you publish an automation process to the Orchestrator Workspace, a process is created automatically if one does not already exist, and existing processes are updated to the latest published version. Please note that you need to manually choose “Upgrade to latest version” to update an existing process.
    3. Select publish in the Studio Design tab ribbon.
    4. Follow steps, without configuring additional options.

Navigate to SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Actions:

Sign in to Process Intelligence and on the left side panel navigate to Action tab:

For each action, you specify a SIGNAL query and one or more tasks. The SIGNAL query produces results when the action is run. These results are then used in the defined tasks.

  1. Create a new Action or edit an existing one:
  2. Add a new Action Task of type Webhook.
  3. Paste the URL generated earlier, in the “Webhook Endpoint” field.
  4. Select ‘None’ for “Authentication Type”.
  5. Select Attributes to be included, for example, ‘case_id’.
  6. Your newly created action task should look like this:
  7. Save Action.
  8. Run Action associated with the UiPath integration.
  9. The moment the action runs, the “HTTP Webhook: Webhook Event Happened” event of our published process is triggered, and therefore initiates the process to produce a job.

Navigate to Orchestrator:

  1. Select Tenant and Workspace. In this tutorial, we use the default tenant and the workspace ‘SomeUnattendedRobot’. Enterprise users might have multiple tenants/workspaces.
  2. Select ‘Automations’ tab from the navigation bar.
  3. You’re directed to ‘Processes’ tab by default where existing already published processes are displayed.
  4. By refreshing the table, you notice the updated process, that was published earlier.
  5. Click the ellipsis (3 dots) next to the process and select “Upgrade to latest version” to update the process, follow prompts.

In Orchestrator Automations:

  1. You see the new job being posted with a "Pending" / "Running" status:
  2. Click on details to review Job details and Logs:
  3. Job has completed successfully:

Browse Storage Buckets in the same workspace and select ‘TestBucket’:

  1. Refresh list of files.
  2. Download ‘test2.txt’ and review content:
  3. Content matches the Action’s results:

That is it, you've made it! Feel free to reach out to us with any questions. 🙂

Prerequisites:

  1. UiPath  Studio
    1.  For Studio Desktop: install the HTTP Webhook Activity Pack through Manage Packages. This package is supported as of Studio Desktop 23.4 and beyond.
    2. For Studio Web, the package will automatically be installed.
  2. UiPath Orchestrator
  3. An Orchestrator Bucket named ‘TestBucket’, containing an empty file ‘test2.txt’.

Additional resources for UiPath Studio:

  1. Creating a basic process: tutorial
  2. Publishing a project: tutorial
  3. Workflow activities used:
    1. Webhook Event Happened
    2. Write Storage Text
    3. Assign

entry.title: Re: CA Introscope
entry.content: How can i make Introscope Enterprise Manager service on?

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: Thanks junwu it works. Sorry I have not removed $format=json in my previous trial. I just focus on using $Batch that works

entry.title: About CAL Subscription
entry.content:
We are currently using the free version package “SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance” for a trial period to build our environment.
My question is, will the paid version package have more features than the free version package?
I am looking into the details of the paid version, but was not sure what additional features would be available from the free version.

entry.title: Foreign exchange gain/loss on GR on purchase order
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We have foreign currency purchase orders and requirement is to post the foreign exchange gain /loss at the time of Goods Receipt.

Exx. If PO is in EUR and at the time of PO exchang rate is 1EUR = 1:50 USD and at the time of GR .. the exchange rate changed to 1 EUR= 1:25.

We would like the exchange gain/loss posting to be created for the 0.25 exchange rate difference in the GOods Receipt posting.

As of now, the GR is just posting into inventory and GR/IR account. 

Is there a particular system config required to achieve above?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to Add Custom Fields to Supplier Invoice Template Using Coding Block Business Context?
entry.content:
When you enter supplier invoices in the template file downloaded from the Import Supplier Invoices app, you might wonder if there is any way to add custom fields to the standard template to extend it. By adding your desired fields to the template, entering the necessary information, and uploading the invoice file back to the Import Supplier Invoices app, you can have invoices posted containing your desired information. In this blog post, I'll show you how to extend the supplier invoice template with your custom fields using the Coding Block Business Context.

This blog post contains the following process steps:
1. Adding custom fields using the Coding Block context and enable the fields
2. Maintaining information for the custom fields in supplier invoice template
3. Verifying the usability of the custom fields

Adding custom fields using the Coding Block business context

1.  Open the Custom Fields app.

2. Search for custom fields under the Accounting: Coding Block business context, and find the ones you want to add. Here I want to add the two fields UCOL GL Text Field and UCOI Numerical Field to my supplier invoice template.

 3. Enter the details page of the selected custom fields and switch to the User Interfaces tab.

Find user interfaces for the custom fields

4. Search for the Manage Journal Entries and Manage Supplier Invoice data source, and enable usage of the UCOL GL Text Field custom field on the two user interfaces.

Enable usage in Manage Journal Entries UI

 Enable Usage in the Manage Supplier Invoice UI

 4. Save and publish the custom fields.

5. Do the same for the UCOI Numerical Field custom field.

Maintaining information for the custom fields in supplier invoice template

1. Go to the Import Supplier Invoices app, and download the latest invoice template.

Download the latest invoice template

 2. In the downloaded template, unhide the G/L account items. The two custom fields that I have added display here.

Locate the added custom fields

 3. Maintain the two custom fields and other required fields in the invoice template.

Maintain information in the custom fields

 4. Upload the maintained invoice file back to the Import Supplier Invoices app, and post the invoice.

Upload maintained invoice file

Verifying the usability of the custom fields

 1. Go to the Manage Supplier Line Items app, find the journal entry for the invoice, and display the journal entry in the Manage Journal Entry app.

Manage the journal entry

 2. I click into the details of the line item, and will find that the two fields appear in the details with the values that I maintained in the invoice template file.Check the line item details

 Custom fields with maintained information

Conclusion

By adding custom fields using the Coding Block business context,  and enabling the custom fields in desired user interface, I have successfully extended the standard supplier invoice template to include the information I want to display in the journal entry details.

You can also add new custom fields and enable them in the relevant user interface in a similar way. For detailed information on how to proceed, see Adding an Extension Field to a Coding Block Reuse Component : Example | SAP Help Portal.

At the end

Here are some related links that you might find useful when you try this out in your system:

Custom Fields App and Custom Logic App | SAP Help Portal

Creating Custom Fields | SAP Help Portal

Import Supplier Invoices | SAP Help Portal

Feel free to leave a comment if you have any further questions. You can also follow my profile to receive updates about supplier invoice topics😊.

entry.title: Re: FileUploader SAPUI5 Version 1.103
entry.content: I have similar issue, can you please provide more details on how is this resolved?

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Re-designed Panel Design
entry.content: I'm assuming this will become the default at some point? (I was assuming when 4.0.1 was officially released, but apparently not...).

entry.title: Re: Mexico VAT tax and External tax systems
entry.content: Hi Sekhar, Yes, SAP is only recommend a 3rd party tax engine for USA and Canada via note number 1497956 - External tax calculation only for US, CA, PR in SAP Standard. However, Vertex does provide tax calculation solution outside USA, CA, and PR. We have done multiple successful Global implementation of Vertex. Please note: Any issue outside USA, CAnada, and PR must be solved by implementation partner/Vertex.

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content: Your sold to party is US, your billing is from US only the ship-to is from Canada.

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content: Your sold to party is US, your billing is from US only the ship-to is from Canada. As per tax

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content: Your sold to party is US, your billing is from US only the ship-to is from Canada. Request you to please provide the actual goods movement in this scenario. If goods are moving from US to CA then it should be export / import scenario.

entry.title: Re: No JE for Use tax on Supplier invoice
entry.content: HI Chintan, are you using external tax system for tax determination or standard SAP. Also, review your configuration with the Use tax code setup.

entry.title: How to add Document as a PRT to routing header?
entry.content:
Hi PP Guru,

Is there a way to enable Document addition to Routing header?

It can be useful for general instruction for order as opposed to Document PRT on operation.

Kindly extend your support, please,

Thank you so much,

Sally
